a_letter_to_self.title: 💌 A Letter to Self
a_letter_to_self.subtitle: A moment of kindness, just for you
a_letter_to_self.intro_text: Stress can make us forget how strong we are. This activity helps you pause, reflect, and speak kindly to yourself.
a_letter_to_self.no_judgments: No judgments. No pressure. Just you.
a_letter_to_self.write_placeholder:
Dear me,

I know things have been difficult...
a_letter_to_self.complete_msg: Your letter has been saved safely.
